cleavage agent: enzyme digestion by trypsin with 2 missed cleavage sites.
enrichment method: the amount of the pre-mRNA co-precipitated by anti-Prp28 antibody peaked at 0.05 mM ATP.
fragmentation method: MS/MS was run in top speed mode with 3-s cycles with CID for protein id or ETD for phosphopeptide.
instrument: Nano-LC-NanoESI-MS/MS on an Orbitrap Fusion mass spectrometer.
labeling: adopted the LFQ (Label-Free Quantification) intensity of protein for quantification.
